subject: F1000 Monthly Update - October 2014
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  October 2014 

-----------------------------------------------------

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
Edvard Moser wins 2014 Nobel
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
 
We are thrilled to congratulate Faculty Member Edvard I Moser [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1840343554137065 ] on winning the 2014 Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine [ http://f1000pri.me/aL ]. Moser, a Faculty Member in Neuroscience, shares the Nobel with his wife May-Britt Moser and John O'Keefe. The trio were awarded the prize for their discoveries of cells that constitute a positioning system in the brain. Read more on our blog [ http://f1000pri.me/aL ].
 
   F1000Prime                                
==================

855 recommendations [ http://f1000pri.me/past30days ] added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members in the past 30 days*. Below is a selection:


11 *
Can cancer trigger autoimmunity? 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718199197?key=11NtUFDRQOpMa3E ]
A fascinating look at how somatic mutations in cancer can potentially cause autoimmune disease in humans.
Joseph CG, Darrah E, Shah AA et al. Science. 2014; 343:152-7


8 *
A fish out of water 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718546334?key=J88p1j9qDCMZRus ]
An air-breathing aquatic fish reared on land sheds light on developmental plasticity and the origin of tetrapods.
Standen EM, Du TY, Larsson HC. Nature. 2014; 513:54-8


11 *
Hair-raising find 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718535351?key=3b9x1jEEWrx7oKH ]
There's hope for hair regrowth. Alopecia areata is driven by cytotoxic T lymphocytes but reversed by JAK inhibition.
Xing L, Dai Z, Jabbari A et al. Nat Med. 2014; 20:1043-9

*Accurate at the time of writing.


 F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

This month's issue contains two articles that present different views of the role of dynamin in vesicle budding (below).

Reaching a consensus on the mechanism of dynamin? 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/6/86/ ]
F1000Prime Report by Roux A [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1582987620423428 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:86

Regulating dynamin dynamics during endocytosis 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/6/85/ ]
F1000Prime Report by Sundborger AC [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097520797 ] and Hinshaw JE [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097517169 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:86


 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   
    

---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
Open Access Week 
~~~~~~~~~

The week of October 20 is International Open Access Week. F1000Research has a few online activities planned, including a Reddit Science AMA (ask me anything) on October 21. Check our blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ] in the coming weeks for more info.

----------------------
  
  
   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Electrical maturation of neurons derived from human embryonic stem cells [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-196/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4gy ]
Published: 01 Oct 2014
Telias M, Segal M and Ben-Yosef D
F1000Research 2014, 3:196

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Strategies of the honeybee Apis mellifera during visual search for vertical targets presented at various heights: a role for spatial attention? [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-174/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/3yb ]
Published: 28 Jul 2014
Morawetz L, Chittka L and Spaethe J
F1000Research 2014, 3:174

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Novel somatic single nucleotide variants within the RNA binding protein hnRNP A1 in multiple sclerosis patients [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-132/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4dh ]
Published: 18 Sep 2014
Lee S and Levin M
F1000Research 2014, 3:132

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Deletion of ENTPD3 does not impair nucleotide hydrolysis in primary somatosensory neurons or spinal cord [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-163/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4dl ]
Published: 19 Sep 2014
McCoy E, Street S, Taylor-Blake B et al.
F1000Research 2014, 3:163

~~~~~~~~~ 
Rare Disease Article Collection
~~~~~~~~~ 

Our article collection on rare disease research [ http://f1000research.com/article-collections/rarediseases ] is now open for submissions and a 20% discount on the article processing charge will apply to all submissions received by 15 October 2014. We welcome basic research, translational and clinical studies relating to rare diseases, including small findings, negative and null results, review and opinion articles, and case reports.
 
 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 
 
  
     F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:

* GENOMICS & GENETICS *   

Connecting multiple gene expression signatures with candidate drugs for boosting heart regeneration potential 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1096884 ]
de Klein N, Rodius S, Muller A
F1000Posters 2014, 5:1432  

* WOMEN'S HEALTH *

Do maternal obesity and mood disorders correlate with changes in placental glucocorticoid transporter gene expression? 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1096771 ]
Mina T, Davidson C, Norman J et al.
F1000Posters 2014, 5:1411


  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
 ---------------------------------------------- 


----------------------

@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
@F1000Posters [ http://twitter.com/f1000posters ]  
 
  * 'Like' us on Facebook * 
  
F1000Prime [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]   
F1000Posters [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Posters ]  
 
  * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
  
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000Prime Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].
